Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class IterableCheck<T>

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<IterableCheck<T>,Iterable<T>>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.IterableCheck<T>
Type Parameters:
T - the element type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<IterableCheck<T>,Iterable<T>>
public final class IterableCheck<T> extends AbstractCheck<IterableCheck<T>,Iterable<T>>
Fluent assertions for Iterable values. Unlike CollectionCheck, this works with lazy iterables (custom iterators, generator-backed sequences) without requiring a Collection. 

 checkThatIterable(lazySequence).isNotEmpty().contains("target");
 checkThatIterable(generator).hasSize(100).allMatch(x -> x > 0, "positive");
